hero.title: Empowering Learners at
hero.description: We're on a mission to make quality English education accessible to everyone, everywhere. Our platform connects passionate learners with expert tutors from around the world.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize English language education by providing affordable, personalized, and effective learning experiences that empower individuals to achieve their communication goals and unlock new opportunities.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where language barriers no longer limit potential. We envision a global community of confident English speakers who can connect, collaborate, and succeed in any environment.

story.title: Our
story.paragraph1: EngConnect was born from a simple observation: despite countless language learning apps and resources, many people still struggle to speak English confidently. We realized that the missing piece was genuine human connection.
story.paragraph2: Founded in 2025, we set out to build a platform that combines the best of technology with the irreplaceable value of one-on-one human interaction. Our AI-powered tools enhance learning, but our expert tutors bring the lessons to life.
story.paragraph3: Today, we're proud to have helped over 50,000 students from 120+ countries improve their English skills and achieve their dreams, whether that's landing a dream job, studying abroad, or simply connecting with people from around the world.

values.title: Our Core
values.description: These principles guide everything we do and shape how we serve our community

passion.title: Passion for Learning
passion.description: We believe in the transformative power of education and are dedicated to making learning enjoyable.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously improve our platform with cutting-edge technology to enhance the learning experience.

community.title: Community
community.description: We foster a supportive global community where learners and tutors grow together.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We maintain the highest standards in everything from tutor selection to lesson quality.

cta.title: Join Our Growing Community
cta.description: Start your English learning journey today and become part of a global community of learners achieving their goals.

helpSupport.title: Help & Support
helpSupport.subtitle: Need help? Create a support ticket and we'll get back to you.

hero.title: How Can We
hero.description: Browse our frequently asked questions or create a support ticket to get personalized assistance from our team.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions about EngConnect.

general.a1: EngConnect is an online platform that connects English learners with experienced tutors. Our platform offers live 1-on-1 sessions, group classes, and self-paced courses to help you improve your English skills.
general.q2: How do I create an account?
general.a2: Click the 'Get Started' button on our homepage. You can register using your email address or sign in with Google. The process takes less than a minute.
general.a3: Creating an account is free. You can browse courses and tutor profiles at no cost. Payment is only required when you enroll in a course or book a session with a tutor.
general.a4: We accept major credit/debit cards, bank transfers, and various digital payment methods. All payments are processed securely through our platform.
general.a5: You can create a support ticket directly from this page by clicking 'Create Ticket'. Our support team typically responds within 24 hours.

student.q1: How do I find the right course?
student.a1: Use our Browse Courses page to filter by category, level, and price. You can also read course descriptions and reviews from other students to find the perfect match.
student.q2: Can I cancel or reschedule a session?
student.a2: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule a session up to 24 hours before the scheduled time. Go to your Schedule page in the dashboard to manage your bookings.
student.q3: How do I track my learning progress?
student.a3: Your Student Dashboard shows your enrolled courses, completed lessons, upcoming sessions, and overall progress. You can also view detailed statistics for each course.
student.q4: What if I'm not satisfied with a course?
student.a4: If you're not satisfied, you can contact the tutor directly to discuss your concerns. You can also create a support ticket and our team will help resolve the issue.
student.q5: Can I switch tutors during a course?
student.a5: Course enrollment is tied to a specific tutor. If you'd like to switch, you can discuss with the current tutor or contact support for assistance.

tutor.q1: How do I become a tutor on EngConnect?
tutor.a1: Visit the 'Become a Tutor' page and fill out the registration form. You'll need to provide your qualifications, experience, and verify your identity. Our team will review your application within 3-5 business days.
tutor.q2: How do I create and publish a course?
tutor.a2: Go to your Tutor Dashboard and click 'Create Course'. Fill in the course details, upload materials, set your pricing, and submit for review. Once approved by our admin team, your course will be published.
tutor.q3: When and how do I get paid?
tutor.a3: Earnings are calculated based on course enrollments and completed sessions. You can view your earnings in the Tutor Dashboard and request withdrawals according to our payment schedule.
tutor.q4: How do I manage my schedule?
tutor.a4: Use the Schedule page in your Tutor Dashboard to set your availability, view upcoming sessions, and manage bookings. Students can only book during your available time slots.
tutor.q5: What should I do if a student misses a session?
tutor.a5: If a student misses a session without prior notice, you can report it through your dashboard. Our policy protects tutors in cases of no-shows.
